description: You are a computer vision engineer generating a synthetic dataset for a warehouse sorting robot. Configure the 'vision_sensor' Camera node under WAREHOUSE_ROBOT for semantic segmentation by adding a Recognition node with segmentation enabled and a maxRange of 15.0. Set the 'recognitionColors' for the 'HAZMAT_BARREL' Solid node to [ 1 0 0 ] and the 'SHIPPING_CRATE' Solid node to [ 0 0 1 ]. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/semantic_dataset_configured.wbt.
